title: Westco 22mm Brass Flanged Tank Connector - Heavy Duty
features: Heavy duty tank connector: 22mm BSP compression fitting for secure connections through tanks and vessels
Solid brass construction: Durable and corrosion resistant for long-lasting performance
Flanged design: Includes backnut and washer for a reliable, leak-proof seal
Easy to install: Designed for straightforward fitting with standard plumbing tools
Versatile use: Suitable for water, heating, and irrigation systems
description: The 22mm brass flanged tank connector is a high-quality plumbing fitting designed for creating secure and leak-proof connections through tanks, cisterns, and vessels. Constructed from durable solid brass, it provides excellent corrosion resistance and long-lasting reliability. Complete with a flanged backnut and washer, it ensures a strong seal and simple installation, making it perfect for a wide range of domestic, commercial, and industrial plumbing systems. • 22mm BSP (British Standard Pipe) compression connection • Heavy-duty solid brass body for durability and strength • Corrosion and rust resistant for extended service life • Flanged backnut and washer included for secure sealing • Leak-proof design for tanks, cisterns, and plumbing vessels • Suitable for water, heating, and irrigation system applications • Ideal for domestic, commercial, and industrial plumbing use
